title: Hopper+
description: Speeds up all funnels by 8 times! 20 items per second instead of 2.5. Compatible with other mods.
body:
**HopperPlus** - a mod that speeds up all hoppers in Minecraft by **8** times!
No more need to build complex structures from regular hoppers -
one accelerated hopper transfers **20** items per second instead of ~~2.5~~.

**Features**:
- **8**x speed boost
- **20** items/second
- Automatic operation
- Compatibility with other mods
- Easy installation

**_Perfect for automatic farms, sorting systems and industrial complexes!_**
